The functionality is clear and complete, as the board accurately displays all six types of chess pieces according to standard rules. Nothin

The current setup has implemented the basic piece movement and turn flow, but it lacks the fundamental rule enforcement of chess: checking if a move leaves the King in check (safety). I will refactor the move generation system to implement check detection, ensuring that any move that results in the player's own King being in check is instantly invalidated. I will also refine the AI to only choose from these truly safe moves.
